## Description

<!-- What does this change do? Why? -->


## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor / cleanup
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] CI / build / tooling
- [ ] Breaking change

## Testing

- [ ] `make test` passes
- [ ] `make lint` passes
- [ ] Manual testing — paste the command(s) and a snippet of output:

```bash
$ ./inkog ...
```

## Checklist

- [ ] No secrets, API keys, or real customer data in code or test fixtures
- [ ] User-visible changes mentioned in the PR description (port to `CHANGELOG.md` on release)
- [ ] If this changes output formatting, screenshots / before-and-after included above
- [ ] If this adds a CLI flag, `docs/CLI_REFERENCE.md` updated
